subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that in the prime of youth thou hast attained unto the recognition of the Lord of Final Return. Know thou the value of this heavenly bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله در ریعان شباب بعرفان مالک ماب فائز شدی قدر این نعمت سمائیه را بدان
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @transcendence; unknowability of God
